calendar.matters:
Petition For Accounting Demand For Distribution For Breach Trust, Removal Of Cotrustees An Appointment Of Independent Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Text Ruling

PETITION TO TRANSFER to SAN MATEO County
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anne Steele appeared by zoom for and with Rivers Williams, Sr. by zoom.
Jonathan Madison appeared by zoom for Renee Underwood and Kathy Ford (respondents).

Discussion was held regarding venue and where the pricipal place of administration of the trust occurs. The court is granting the Petition to Change Venue to San Mateo. The Petition for Accounting, Demand for Distribution, For Breach of Trust, Removal of Co-Trustees and an Appointment of Independent Trustee is to be heard in San Mateo County.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Petition For Accounting Demand For Distribution For Breach Trust, Removal Of Cotrustees An Appointment Of Independent Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Continued To Jun-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anne Steele appeared by zoom for and with Rivers Williams, Sr.
Jonathan Madison appeared by zoom for Kathy Ford and Renee Underwood.
John Mangini appeared by zoom for Debra Dolch (nominated successor trustee).

Mr. Madison stated that he served the other side with a motion for change of venue, but he needs a hearing date. Mrs. Steele stated that there is going to be a problem with the accounting as it will be from July of 2011, that she believes there are five parcels of real estate, spoke of maladministration of the trust and the manner in which the co-trustees have made distributions without the authority to do so, and stated that they need to have someone who is a professional with experience and that Debra Dolch is ready to step in. The Petition for Accounting Demand for Distribution for Breach of Trust, etc. is continued to June 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Madison is to file a petition for change of venue which is to be set with a hearing date of June 17, 2024 (date approved by Judge Moody). The court advises the parties that an accounting is going to be needed regardless of where the matter is heard and encourages the parties to work on the merits.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Accounting Demand For Distribution For Breach Trust, Removal Of Cotrustees An Appointment Of Independent Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Continued To Apr-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Anne Steele, Esq., for Rivers Williams, Petitioner.
Jonathan Madison, Esq., for Kathy Ford and Renee Underwood, Objectors.

The court acknowledges Mr. Madison's opposition that is pending in the court's e-filing queue. Counsel then presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the instant petition. Mr. Madison reports that Respondents are not residents of the City and County of San Francisco. Respondents reside in the County of San Mateo. Thus, the San Francisco Superior Court is not the proper venue.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-29-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

Petition For Accounting Demand For Distribution For Breach Trust, Removal Of Cotrustees An Appointment Of Independent Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Continued To Mar-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
